Sidecar format & locking.question: Telemetry storage format under .voss/memory/?
Sidecar format & locking.answer: JSONL append-log (.retrieval.jsonl), compacted into counts by vacuum

Sidecar format & locking.question: Telemetry write timing on hot path?
Sidecar format & locking.answer: Sync append at recall return, non-blocking portalocker, skip-on-contention (lost increment harmless)

Floor mechanics.question: Chroma floor form?
Floor mechanics.answer: Absolute similarity floor, ~0.25 default, config [memory] chroma_floor

Floor mechanics.question: BM25 floor form?
Floor mechanics.answer: Relative-to-top ratio, ~0.1 default, config [memory] bm25_floor_ratio; preserves tiny-corpus token-overlap rescue

Floor mechanics.question: Floor scope in cross-corpus paths?
Floor mechanics.answer: Per-retriever per-store pre-fusion; RRF fuses already-floored lists; code corpus untouched
